asr_es: Muchas gracias, señor Vitorino. Queda cerrado el debate. Mis señorías, de conformidad con el orden del día, se procede al debate de las preguntas orales de cuatro grupos políticos al Consejo y a la Comisión sobre el desarme nuclear, relativas a la conferencia de examen del Tratado de No Progresión en 2005, los trabajos de la Unión Europea para el Tercer Comité Preparatorio del TNP, por favor, señorías. El orden del día continúa. Y doy la palabra para iniciar el debate al señor Virsma, tres minutos, en calidad de autor.
hypothesis_en: Thank you very much, Mr Vitorino. The debate is closed. Ladies and gentlemen, in accordance with the order of the day, we shall now proceed to the debate on the oral questions from four political groups to the Council and the Commission on nuclear disarmament, concerning the review conference of the Non-Proliferation Treaty in 2005, the work of the European Union for the Third Preparatory Committee of the NPT, please, ladies and gentlemen.
reference_en: thank you Mr Vitorino the debate is now closed (4.29) members moving on with the agenda (1.03) we now have the debate on the oral questions from four political groups to the Council and Commission concerning nuclear disarmament (1.51) concerning the review conference of the NPT (2.7) the work of the European Union for the third preporo= preparatory committee of the NPT (4.42) we do have to carry on ladies and gentlemen (1.13) and I give the floor now to start the debate (1.08) to Mr Wiersma three minutes (1.1) as the author of the oral question
